name: Chunky Clam Rarebit
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz) Italian peeled, tomatoes; crushed, whole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Stir in green pepper and mushrooms and cook until softened but not browned, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in flour. Cook, stirring, 1 minute. Gradually add tomatoes and their liquid, stirring constantly.
Add milk, cheese, mustard, Worcestershire, and clams with liquid and cook, stirring, until heated through and cheese has melted, about 5 minutes.
